---
title: "Overview and Trends at Major Reservoirs"
author: "Colorado River Data Mapping Project"
format: html
---

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
// Load elevation data
Res_Elv = await d3.csv("Data/Reservoir_Elevation.csv")
```
```{ojs}
//| echo: false
Plotly = require("plotly.js-dist")
```
```{ojs}
//| echo: false
// Reservoir selector
viewof reservoir_choice = Inputs.select(
  ["Lake Mead", "Lake Powell"],
  { label: "Reservoir:", value: "Lake Mead" }
)

// Filter data based on selection
filtered = Res_Elv.filter(d => d.Reservoir === reservoir_choice)
```
```{ojs}
//| echo: false

traces = [{
  x: filtered.map(d => d.Year),
  y: filtered.map(d => +d.Elevation),
  type: "scatter",
  mode: "lines+markers",
  name: reservoir_choice,
  line: { width: 2 },
  marker: { size: 4 }
}]

layout = ({
  title: reservoir_choice + " Elevation",
  width: 800,
  height: 450,
  margin: { t: 50, r: 30, b: 50, l: 60 },
  xaxis: {
    title: "Year",
    tickformat: "d",
    showgrid: false
  },
  yaxis: {
    title: "Elevation (ft)",
    showgrid: true
  }
})

html`<div id="elv-plot" style="width:800px; margin: 0 auto;"></div>`
Plotly.newPlot("elv-plot", traces, layout)
```
